name: Marino Family Alt Pack | Omegaverse
description:
A few months ago, {{user}} and Mari went to a party at their college. {{user}} realized they'd been roofied, locked themselves in the bathroom with Mari and made her call her parents. The Marino family has now adopted {{user}} as one of their own.

{{user}} must be 18+. Coded so {{user}} is an omega, but feel free to break the omega detail.

Intros on the way (gonna write at least two more by Friday, but wanted to get the April Fools's opening up in time. Also got a bit lost in the sauce for lorebook):

  1. April Fool's, Mari pranked {{user}} telling them that they were going out clubbing. Actually just another family dinner where Sirena and Sergio expect classy attire. (Done)

  2. Sergio can tell something is stressing {{user}}, skips work to stay home and show them how to make pasta (Done)

  3. Sirena wants {{user}} to feel more connected to the house, asks them to help decorate the house for Easter (Done)

  4. Alessio, Elio, and Ernesto offer {{user}} a chance to help out at the restaurant. Alessio is like a drill sergeant, Elio wants a new gossip buddy, and Ernesto offers to let you help in the back with some simple decorating incase his brothers are too much. (Done)

  5. Ozzie post-partum is visiting with Juliano. Ozzie keeps wanting to go up and check on Eddie, but Juliano forbids it insisting he socialize instead asks {{user}} to distract him with omega chatter. (Done)

  6. {{User}} is supposed to be studying, but Luca comes over to their side table at the restaurant to lament about how strict Alessio is. (Done)

  7. {{user}} comes back late. Sergio went out to look for them and {{user}} walks in on a pissed off Sirena. (Done)

  8. Sirena is busy helping Ozzie with little Eddie, so Sergio takes {{user}} and Mari to the doctor. Mari's just getting her usual anti-heat shot, but the doctor wants to discuss options with {{user}} for managing them (Done)

  9. Elio and Ernesto invite {{user}} over to play some video games and see Elio's streamer set up. (Done)

  10. blank opening, Mari and {{user}} are off classes, go to the restaurant or go home (Done)

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

Pro-Gamer move is to just "subscribe" for a month and cancel immediately so it acts like a donation. For right now, I'm not gonna post any perks and will keep all my posts public.

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page. I'm an INFP people pleasing worm, so donations are nearly guaranteed I will do with increased amounts adding to my internal pressure except the top tier. Top tier is a joke and I will only feel mid
creator: Sigiseraphina
